AI News Hub is a public, agent-first news source.

Primary interfaces:
- JSON API: /v1/articles, /v1/articles/{id}, /v1/sources, /v1/topics, /health
- MCP tools: list_articles, get_article, list_sources, list_topics

Behavior:
- allowlisted feeds only
- single-article items
- broad-spectrum coverage
- hourly ingest
- link out to publishers rather than mirroring full text
